description: Deep ConvNet: 3 conv blocks (1→32→64→128) + BN + ReLU, FC(128*49→256→10). Adam lr=0.002, CosineAnnealingLR T_max=8600, batch_size=128, 20 epochs, CPU. Compared to exp2 CNN 99.09%.
hypothesis: A 3-layer deeper CNN (32→64→128) with CosineAnnealingLR, lr=0.002, and 20 epochs will push test accuracy past 99.3% on MNIST.
